auth.title: A private memory capsule for two
auth.subtitle: What appears here depends on whether this device already has a passkey saved for this site.
auth.name: Display name
auth.register: Create a passkey on this device
auth.login: Sign in with a saved device
auth.deviceBody: Windows Hello only appears when this PC already has a passkey for this site. If it does not appear, this computer is not bound yet. Use a phone, tablet, or another device that already has access.
auth.loginHint: This page does not accept a PIN or email code. It only uses passkeys already saved on the current device.
auth.recoveryBody: Recovery only works when recovery email is enabled for this deployment. If email is not configured, submitting a request will not send anything.
auth.recoveryDisabled: Recovery email is not enabled on this deployment yet. Use a device that is already signed in, or another device that already has a saved passkey.
auth.recoveryPreview: Development preview mode returns a recovery token directly instead of sending email.
auth.registerFailed: Failed to create a passkey on this device
auth.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. This device may not have a saved passkey for this site.
auth.cancelled: The request was cancelled, or this device has no usable passkey for this site.
pairing.title: Secure your two-person space.
pairing.subtitle: Create a single-use invite or join with a code from your partner.
home.empty: No memories yet. Capture the first moment and let the timeline begin.
timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.empty: No memories match the current filters.
gallery.title: Private Gallery
gallery.empty: Upload a few photos and this gallery will come alive.
anniversaries.title: Anniversaries
anniversaries.empty: Add your first milestone to start countdowns and reminders.
wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.empty: Keep a list of places, rituals, and promises you want to share.
settings.title: Settings
home.recentlyAddedNote: This memory now shows up on the home screen instead of saving silently.
home.recentlyAddedFallback: Your latest saved memory is visible here now, and you can jump back to the timeline anytime.
timeline.recentlyAddedNote: This memory has been saved to the timeline, and matching cards below are highlighted.
timeline.recentlyAddedFallback: Your latest saved memory is now visible in the timeline instead of disappearing quietly.
